case_title: TOM LAM VS. VAN TIEU et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-14-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAM, TOM SERVED SEP-14-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HAU, HOWARD

LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF TOM LAM'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO HABITABLITY, RETALIATION AND DAMAGES THROUGH HIS DECLARATION. DEFENDANT TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER THAT COMPLIES WITH CCP 437C(G). JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR #8189

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-01-2010 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Oct-14-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF TOM LAM'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is denied. Defendant has raised a triable issue of material fact as to habitablity, retaliation and damages through his declaration. Defendant to submit a proposed form of order that complies with CCP 437c(g). (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189
